prompt: Camera orbit left. A surreal fantasy illustration of a moonlit conservatory suspended above a cyberpunk harbor, rendered as hand-inked linework filled with luminous gouache. In the center, a brass astrolabe fountain rises from cracked marble, encircled by orchid vines threaded through copper gears and glass tubes. One half of the structure glows with neon magenta signs reflected in rain-slick tiles; the other half fades into velvet indigo mist where moths resemble tiny mechanical lanterns. Arched ribs, bridges, and hanging cages create layered depth, while every surface keeps the crisp, deliberate texture of premium illustrated concept art.

Camera orbit right. A steampunk city square interpreted as a richly printed poster illustration, with a disciplined palette of oxidized teal, burnished copper, cream, and charcoal black. At the heart stands a towering clock kiosk wrapped in belts, pistons, and curling iron filigree, while elevated tram rails sweep behind it and market awnings cluster at street level. The cobbles are simplified into rhythmic graphic shapes, smoke stacks release stylized ribbons, and figures in tailored coats read as elegant silhouettes with selective detail. Bold contour lines, flat color blocks, halftone shading, and visible brush drag keep the whole image firmly within a handcrafted retro-futurist medium.

Camera pan left. A storybook valley at dawn painted in translucent watercolor and soft pastel, arranged with a winding river in the foreground, terraced cottages across the middle distance, and a ruined hilltop abbey dissolving into pale mist. Pigment blooms feather along the tree canopies, granulation gathers in the stone walls, and the sky washes from apricot into cool blue with paper texture clearly visible beneath. A clothesline, footbridge, grazing sheep, and chimney smoke provide small readable anchors across the span, while edges alternate between delicate ink definition and gentle bleed, preserving the tactile charm of an illustrated children’s classic rather than realism.

Camera pan right. A cyberpunk dreamscape treated as a surreal illustration, where a narrow canal threads between stacked buildings assembled from boiler parts, shrine gates, and glowing circuitry. In the foreground, a masked violinist stands on a wrought iron bridge beneath tangled cables and steam valves; farther along, floating koi-shaped drones drift between neon laundry lines and stained glass windows. The color world is electric cyan, toxic violet, ember orange, and deep petroleum black, with exaggerated perspective, etched shadows, and deliberate ink scratches. Recurring arches, signs, pipes, and reflections create a demanding layered read while the image remains fully stylized and illustrational.
